name: ocr
title: OCR Tutorial
description: Learn how to extract text from scanned PDFs using OCR

steps.text:
📄 Add PDFs for OCR

Select scanned PDF files or PDFs with images that contain text you want to extract. OCR (Optical Character Recognition) can read text from images!

💡 Perfect for digitizing scanned documents, receipts, and photos of text!

🔍 Extract Text with OCR

Click here to start the OCR process. The system will:
• Analyze each page of your PDFs
• Recognize and extract text from images
• Save the text to .txt files

⚠️ Note: Tesseract OCR must be installed on your system for this to work.
